courseName:
Firebase: Get Cloud-Ready
(Without the Cloudy Head)
courseSubtitle: Unlock the power of cloud development using Firebase — build smarter, faster apps without the backend hassle.
courseDescription: This course is designed for developers of all levels who want to build powerful applications without managing traditional backend infrastructure. Learn Firebase from the ground up — databases, hosting, analytics, AI, and more — all integrated with Google's ecosystem.

campLeader.name: Jayadhar Ummadisingu
campLeader.designation: Full Stack Developer, The Ananta Studio™
bio: Jayadhar,is a Computer Science student with a knack for building things. He is a full-stack developer at heart, comfortable working on everything from crafting intuitive user interfaces with React and Tailwind to building robust backends with Node.js, Express, and Firebase.

He is experienced includes developing websites for events and building innovative applications. He is particularly interested in leveraging technology to solve real-world problems and create positive user experiences.
He is eager to contribute his skills to a team where he can learn and grow.

benefits.text: Firebase simplifies app development by providing real-time databases, authentication, hosting, analytics, and even AI tools—all without managing servers. By the end of this course, you’ll be equipped to build and launch full-featured applications at scale.

list.title: Zero to Cloud
list.content: Learn Firebase from scratch — no prior backend experience needed.

list.title: Fast Development
list.content: Get started quickly with integrated tools for building, deploying, and managing apps.

list.title: Analytics & AI
list.content: Add deep analytics and intelligent features using Firebase’s analytics and ML tools.

list.title: Real-World Projects
list.content: Deploy production-ready apps with authentication, databases, and cloud functions.
